paths.reason: Primary Codrex launcher project and custom recovery work.
Primary Codex account home, including auth, config, skills, and state.
Secondary Codex account homes, account registry, and shared Codrex state.
Codrex launcher session mappings, runtime state, and account bindings.
Telegram bridge scripts and local delivery wiring.

cleanup_policy: Never delete or move anything under the protected paths without explicit path-by-path user confirmation.
For space-cleanup requests, start with read-only size audits and target caches, downloads, temporary build outputs, and package-manager caches outside the protected paths.
Treat auth.json, .credentials.json, registry.json, session-accounts.json, launcher scripts, and codex-home directories as non-disposable state.
